description: Add Coach UI: task/plan dialogs, task list view with filters, Coach tab in MainWindow, coach section in PlayerCardDialog, and basic analytics dashboard.
steps: 1. Create app/ui/coach_task_dialog.py: QDialog for creating/editing a coach task. Fields: title (QLineEdit, required), description (QTextEdit), player_id (QComboBox with players list from PlayerRepository, nullable/optional for general tasks), due_date (QDateEdit, optional), priority (QComboBox: low/normal/high/urgent), category (QLineEdit, optional), status (QComboBox for edit mode: open/in_progress/done/cancelled). Dataclass CoachTaskFormData. Pattern: follow TrainingEntryDialog. All labels in Russian. Save/Cancel buttons. Validation: title required.

2. Create app/ui/training_plan_dialog.py: QDialog for creating/editing a training plan. Fields: title (QLineEdit, required), player_id (QComboBox with players list, required), description (QTextEdit), goal (QTextEdit), start_date (QDateEdit), end_date (QDateEdit), status (QComboBox: active/completed/paused for edit), exercises (QTextEdit with JSON placeholder, e.g. [{"name": "...", "reps": 10}]). Dataclass TrainingPlanFormData. Validation: title required, exercises must be valid JSON array.

3. Create app/ui/coach_view.py: QWidget (Coach tab view) with QTabWidget containing sub-tabs: 'Задачи' (task list with filters), 'Планы' (training plans list), 'Сводка' (dashboard/analytics). Task list sub-tab: QTableWidget with columns [Статус, Приоритет, Игрок, Задача, Срок, Категория, Создано]. Filter bar: status QComboBox (Все/Открыта/В работе/Выполнена/Отменена), priority QComboBox (Все/Низкий/Обычный/Высокий/Срочный), player QComboBox (Все + player list), search QLineEdit. Buttons: 'Создать задачу', 'Редактировать', 'Завершить', 'Удалить'. Double-click opens edit dialog. Plans sub-tab: QTableWidget [Статус, Игрок, Название, Цель, Период, Создано]. Buttons: 'Создать план', 'Редактировать', 'Удалить'. Dashboard sub-tab: QLabel widgets showing counts: open tasks, overdue tasks, urgent tasks, done this month, active plans.
4. In app/ui/main_window.py: Add import for CoachView. Add tab 'Тренер' (insert after 'Контекст' tab, before 'Импорт/Экспорт'). Add alias mappings for 'Тренер'/'Coach' in _activate_tab.

5. In app/ui/player_card_dialog.py: Add a new tab 'План тренера' (7th tab, after 'История'). Contents: QGroupBox 'Задачи тренера' with QTableWidget [Статус, Приоритет, Задача, Срок, Категория] showing tasks for this player. QPushButton 'Создать задачу' to open CoachTaskDialog pre-filled with this player. QPushButton 'Завершить задачу' to complete selected task. QGroupBox 'Тренировочный план' with QTableWidget [Статус, Название, Цель, Период] showing plans for this player. QPushButton 'Создать план' to open TrainingPlanDialog pre-filled with player.

6. Update the coach_view.py dashboard sub-tab (Сводка): Display summary stats using QLabel/QGroupBox: total open tasks, overdue tasks count (red color if >0), urgent tasks count, tasks completed this week/month, active training plans count. Show 'Ближайшие задачи' mini-table with top 5 upcoming due-date tasks. Show 'Просроченные' mini-table with overdue tasks.

7. Create tests/test_coach_view.py: Test that CoachView widget can be instantiated (with QApplication or skipped if no display). Test that coach_task_dialog.py CoachTaskFormData dataclass works. Test that training_plan_dialog.py TrainingPlanFormData dataclass works. Use same skip pattern as other UI tests (pytest.mark.skipif no display).
8. In app/ui/labels.py: Ensure all new label functions are importable and used in the UI modules. If any new session/status types are needed for coach view, add them.
acceptance_criteria: python -m mypy app/ tests/ --ignore-missing-imports passes clean
python -m pytest -x -q passes all tests (existing + new)
MainWindow has 'Тренер' tab that renders CoachView
CoachView has 3 sub-tabs: Задачи, Планы, Сводка
PlayerCardDialog has 7th tab 'План тренера' with tasks and plans sections
CoachTaskDialog validates title is required before accepting
TrainingPlanDialog validates title and exercises JSON before accepting
All UI text is in Russian
verification: python -c "from app.ui.coach_view import CoachView; print('CoachView importable')"
python -c "from app.ui.coach_task_dialog import CoachTaskDialog; print('CoachTaskDialog importable')"
python -c "from app.ui.training_plan_dialog import TrainingPlanDialog; print('TrainingPlanDialog importable')"
